/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Flatten.dir/Flatten/src/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Flatten.dir/Flatten/src/Complex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Flatten.dir/Flatten/src/DenseMatrix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Flatten.dir/Flatten/src/Edge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Flatten.dir/Flatten/src/Face.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Flatten.dir/Flatten/src/HalfEdge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Flatten.dir/Flatten/src/Image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Flatten.dir/Flatten/src/LinearContext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Flatten.dir/Flatten/src/LinearEquation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Flatten.dir/Flatten/src/LinearPolynomial.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Flatten.dir/Flatten/src/LinearSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Flatten.dir/Flatten/src/Mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Flatten.dir/Flatten/src/MeshIO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Flatten.dir/Flatten/src/Quaternion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Flatten.dir/Flatten/src/Real.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Flatten.dir/Flatten/src/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Flatten.dir/Flatten/src/SparseMatrix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Flatten.dir/Flatten/src/Variable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Flatten.dir/Flatten/src/Vector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Flatten.dir/Flatten/src/Vertex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Flatten.dir/Flatten/src/Viewer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Flatten.dir/Flatten/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Flatten.dir/Flatten/src/qcError.cpp.o -o Flatten  -framework OpenGL -framework OpenGL -framework GLUT -framework Cocoa /opt/homebrew/lib/libspqr.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libumfpack.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcholmod.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libmetis.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcolamd.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libccolamd.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcamd.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libamd.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsuitesparseconfig.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libtbb.dylib -framework Accelerate -lm -framework OpenGL -framework GLUT
